channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Recap: RBA lifts rate to 4.1%. Split decision. Inflation risks & capacity pressures build
item.description: RBA delivers split hike as inflation risks rise, with May tightening still in play. This via a recap note from Westpac. Summary: RBA hiked cash rate 25bp to 4.1% in a narrow 5–4 split decision Decision driven by capacity constraints and rising inflation expectations Middle East conflict and fuel price surge key inflation risk factors Labour market ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Financial & Forex Market Recap: March 17, 2026
item.description: Equities and crude oil advanced in tandem for the first time since the Iran war began, the RBA hiked in a narrow vote, and the dollar softened. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: Dollar Pressured by Rising Stocks
item.description: The dollar index (DXY00 ) on Tuesday fell by -0.14%. The dollar gave up overnight gains and turned lower on Tuesday as T-note yields fell after the weekly ADP employment change showed the fewest new jobs added in five weeks, a dovish factor for Fed policy. The dollar extended its... Fuente: Nasdaq FX

item.title: USD/CHF Price Forecast: Slips toward 0.7850 ahead of Fed decision
item.description: The USD/CHF falls during the North American session, depreciating by some 0.20% at the time of writing, trading near 0.7850, as traders brace for the Federal Reserve’s monetary policy decision on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: NZD/USD trims losses as US Dollar weakens ahead of Fed
item.description: The NZD/USD pair is trading near the 0.5860 price region on Tuesday, erasing almost all its intraday losses as the Middle East war escalates, pressuring the US Dollar (USD). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Private survey inventory shows a huge headline crude oil build much larger than expected
item.description: more to come Oil markets are holding firm above the $100 mark, but underlying conditions suggest a far tighter global supply picture than benchmark stability implies. According to JPMorgan, the apparent resilience in Brent and WTI prices should not be mistaken for evidence of ample supply. Instead, it reflects a temporary buffer created by regional... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: US weighs easing Venezuela oil sanctions to boost supply amid global disruptions
item.description: US eyes Venezuela sanctions relief to ease oil tightness, but supply response likely slow. Bloomberg with the headline. Summary: US considering easing Venezuela oil sanctions to boost supply Could add ~200k–400k bpd near term, modest relative to global demand Aims to offset Middle East disruption and ease inflation pressures Infrastructure decay li... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: investingLive Americas market news wrap: A divergence appears between oil and stocks
item.description: Trump was informed most "allies" won't help with Hormoz. Says US doesn't need help anyway Trump on the war: A couple of weeks, not much longer Trump: NATO is making a foolish mistake. They should have been there. U.S. Treasury auctions of $13 billion of 20 year notes at a high yield of 4.817% US February pending home sales +1.8% vs -0.5% expected U... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Head and Shoulders in WTI! Is the rally over for Crude Oil? Stock Markets Mixed ahead of FOMC
item.description: Crude Oil and Dow Jones update: The WTI rally faces exhaustion as the elimination of key Iranian figures signals a potential conflict turning point. WTI forms a Head and Shoulders pattern eyeing $85, while the Dow rejects its channel bound ahead of the FOMC. Explore an intraday technical analysis of the markets. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: Cable rises to a three-day high. What's next
item.description: The pound is trading at the highs of the day as the US dollar gives back most of the big rally on Friday. The market is beginning to take a more-constructive view on the duration and impact of the Iran war, though it's certainly a subject to change on any given headline. In the past few minutes, video of a drone hitting (or near) the US embassy in ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Forex Today: US Dollar extends losses ahead of Fed decision as Middle East tensions escalate
item.description: The US Dollar (USD) lost its firmness and is now on a two-day losing spree. The Greenback initially fell because investors were cautious over the Middle East war and Wednesday's Federal Reserve (Fed) monetary policy decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: FOMC Meeting Preview: A ‘hawkish hold’ as geopolitical risk & stagflation fears rise, implications for the DXY & Dow Jones
item.description: The March 18 FOMC meeting will confirm the end of predictable rate cuts. With the labor market cooling and inflation rising due to the Middle East conflict, the Fed faces a tough balancing act. A "hawkish hold" is expected, extending the US Dollar rally and presenting a risk triangle for the Dow Jones amid leadership uncertainty and political press... Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: EUR/USD rises as US Dollar eases ahead of Fed interest rate decision
item.description: EUR/USD edges higher on Tuesday, extending gains for a second consecutive day as a softer US Dollar (USD) lends support to the Euro (EUR), with market focus gradually shifting from the ongoing US-Iran war to upcoming monetary policy announcements from the Federal Reserve (Fed) and the European Centr Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: US Dollar Index fades as markets hold breath ahead of FOMC
item.description: The US Dollar Index (DXY) eased around 0.20% on Tuesday, slipping back toward the 99.50–99.60 area after a failed attempt to recapture the psychologically significant 100.00 handle. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: European Markets close higher across-the-board
item.description: European indices are higher for the 2nd consecutive day to start the new trading week. This week the SNB, ECB, and BOE announcer interest-rate decisions – all on Thursday. All are expected to keep the rates unchanged. At the close today, the pan-European Euro STOXX 50 gained 0.26%, closing at 5,764.00, setting a constructive tone across the contine... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Pound Sterling Price News and Forecast: GBP/USD extends gains as traders eye Fed-BoE decisions
item.description: The GBP/USD pair is trading near the 1.3350 price region on Tuesday, striking a bullish tone as investors continue to move away from the US Dollar (USD) ahead of the Federal Reserve (Fed) monetary policy decision on Wednesday. Read More... Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EURUSD Technicals: The EURUSD stretches to a new high with the 200 hour MA the key target
item.description: The EURUSD is continuing its push to the upside, with the pair now stretching toward an important technical ceiling defined by the 200-hour moving average at 1.15499. As the price approaches that level, traders are once again faced with a familiar question: can the buyers build enough momentum to break through, or will sellers step in as they have ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: Outlook remains constructive
item.description: The Australian Dollar (AUD) remains firm, with domestic inflation still elevated and the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) keeping its cautious/hawkish stance well in place. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/GBP holds steady as markets await ECB, BoE policy decisions
item.description: EUR/GBP trades around 0.8640 on Tuesday at the time of writing, virtually unchanged for the day, as investors remain on the sidelines ahead of the European Central Bank (ECB) and the Bank of England (BoE) monetary policy decisions due on Thursday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: GBP/USD Price Analysis: Pound extends gains as traders eye Fed-BoE decisions
item.description: The GBP/USD pair is trading near the 1.3350 price region on Tuesday, striking a bullish tone as investors continue to move away from the US Dollar (USD) ahead of the Federal Reserve (Fed) monetary policy decision on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: AUD: Positive terms of trade offsets geopolitical risk – TD Securities
item.description: TD Securities strategists Prashant Newnaha and Alex Loo maintain a constructive stance on the Australian Dollar (AUD) despite the Reserve Bank of Australia's (RBA) close 5-4 vote. A positive terms of trade shock and increased hedging by Australian pension funds underpin AUD outperformance in G10. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USDCHF Technicals: The USDCHF rotates lower but running into dual technical levels
item.description: The USDCHF has moved lower today as the market rotates back toward support following last week’s strong rally. The pair began its move higher from 0.7747 on Tuesday and extended to a peak of 0.7922 yesterday, stalling just short of the 61.8% retracement at 0.79242. That failure near a key Fibonacci level helped trigger the current pullback. On the ... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: GBP/JPY holds steady as traders eye BoE and BoJ rate decisions
item.description: The British Pound (GBP) trades broadly flat against the Japanese Yen (JPY) on Tuesday as a thin economic calendar keeps price action subdued, with attention firmly shifting to the Bank of England (BoE) and Bank of Japan (BoJ) interest rate decisions due on Thursday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USD: War-driven support and Asia FX risks – Deutsche Bank
item.description: Deutsche Bank’s Global Head of FX Research George Saravelos notes that the Iran war has made markets highly correlated to energy, with higher Oil prices and weaker global growth now supporting the Dollar. Asia FX is seen as central to broad Dollar direction and is being hit hardest. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: USDCAD Technicals: The USDCAD backs off highs and stays in the range
item.description: The USDCAD has spent much of the time since January 26 trading within a well-defined range between 1.3522 and 1.3724, with multiple rotations between support and resistance. Last week, sellers pressed the pair down to the lower boundary of that range. However, momentum shifted late in the week, with price breaking above the upper extreme. That brea... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: GBP/USD Pauses Ahead of Bank of England Rate Decision
item.description: By Analytical Department RoboForex GBP/USD is holding near 1.3315 on Tuesday. The pound posted a modest gain the previous day but remains close to three-month lows amid ongoing uncertainty over the impact of the Middle East conflict on the global economy and inflation. Investors continue to favour the US dollar as a key safe-haven asset. […] Fuente: InvestMacro

item.title: JPY: Two way economic risk for Japanese Yen – Rabobank
item.description: Rabobank’s Senior FX Strategist Jane Foley discusses Japanese Yen (JPY) dynamics around upcoming G10 central bank meetings and potential Bank of Japan policy shifts. Foley notes Governor Ueda’s hawkish tone, ongoing BoJ tightening expectations despite higher energy costs. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Winds of war keep blowing as central banks’ decisions loom
item.description: The EUR/USD pair hovers around 1.1530 on Tuesday, reversing an early slump to 1.1466. Financial markets are between a rock and a hard place, as the ongoing escalation of the Iran war and mounting concerns about oil supply disruptions are fueling worldwide inflation. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: AUDUSD pushes higher after RBA, tests key MA support at 100 hour MA and bounces
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia raised its cash rate by 25 basis points to 4.1%, as widely expected, but the decision underscored a growing divide within the board, passing by a narrow 5–4 vote. The hike reflects increasing concern that inflation pressures are re-emerging, with policymakers pointing to stronger demand and capacity constraints that ha... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: German ZEW collapses to -0.5 on rising stagflation risks
item.description: Germany’s ZEW Economic Sentiment plunged sharply in March, highlighting how rapidly confidence is deteriorating under the weight of the global energy shock. The expectations index collapsed from 58.3 to -0.5, far below market forecasts of 39.0, while Eurozone sentiment followed suit, dropping from 39.4 to -8.5. The primary driver is the escalation ... Fuente: ActionForex
